Age: 45
Gender: M
Weight: 75 kg

ADVERSE EVENT INFORMATION:
Term: Severe headache and nausea
Onset Date: 26-03-10
Severity: Moderate
Outcome: Response: Recovering
Dechallenge Performed: No

MEDICINAL PRODUCT:
Name: Paracetamol
Batch Number: Batch: ABC123456
Dose: 500 mg
Route: Oral

REPORT INFORMATION:
